steps.title: Read the vertices
steps.content: From the graph, the triangle's vertices are $(-3,4)$, $(5,3)$, and $(4,-3)$.

steps.title: Use coordinate area
steps.content: Substitute the three points into the area formula: $$ \frac{1}{2}|(-3)(3-(-3))+5((-3)-4)+4(4-3)| $$ $$ =\frac{1}{2}|-18-35+4|=\frac{49}{2} $$ The answer is 24.5.
